title: calanthe pilosa
intro: Calanthe pilosa is a type of terrestrial orchid native to tropical regions of Asia, particularly in China and Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Calanthe pilosa is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, which can be administered orally or applied topically to the affected area.
